label: namecode - WESTERN.EASTERN | 73.498
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Western Moon, Eastern Sea. The Mare Orientale, Latin for Eastern Sea, is one of the most striking large scale lunar features. The youngest of the large lunar impact basins it's very difficult to see from an earthbound Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
